examples: On a coral reef in the Bonin Islands, an abandoned wormhole is home to a hermit crab.
The feedback will become so strong it destroys the wormhole.
As soon as the wormhole expands, natural radiation will enter it, and end up in a loop.
Like a black hole, a wormhole would be a massive gravitational space and time warping object.
Black holes certainly do, but nobody has yet glimpsed any sign of its cousin, the wormhole.
